name: Oat Bran Russian Black Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the yeast and Sucanat in about 1/2 cup of water and set aside until the yeast is foamy.
2. In a large bowl, combine the rye flour, whole wheat flour, salt, oat bran, carob powder, caraway seeds, and fennel seeds.
3. In a separate bowl, mix together the vinegar, molasses, oil, and onion. Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and blend well until a dough forms.
4. If the dough is too stiff or dry, add more water. If it's too sticky, add more flour. Mix thoroughly.
5. Turn the dough out onto a floured surface and knead until smooth. Shape into a round, shallow loaf and place on a lightly oiled baking sheet.
6. Brush the dough with oil and let it rise in a warm spot until it holds an imprint when gently touched (about 30 minutes).
7. Preheat the oven to 375°F. Bake for 35-40 minutes, then cool on a wire rack. Lightly brush the top with oil before serving.
